purpose: Completion audit against the active user objective after the Midsummer meme direct wash slice, VantMacro source audit, and other post-v6 ledger updates.
objective_restatement: Every active Board A regime must have at least 95% calibrated confidence, and the evidence must survive other markets, other timeframes, full-cycle, and broad-universe/full-species validation before reporting success.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: All active price-root regimes have >=95 calibrated confidence.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: V6 preserves scope-limited 95 packets for Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis, but the active cursor and later targeted-gap batch keep full-matrix accounting blocked.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Evidence is validated across other markets, other timeframes, full-cycle, and broad universe/full species.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Current cursor says expanded full-cycle/full-species requirement remains open; the 20260511T110540 targeted gap batch accepted 0 roots with test LCBs Crisis=0.246776, Bull=0.316151, Bear=0.219833, Sideways=0.282312.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: Direct Manipulation uses direct timestamped event/order-flow/order-lifecycle/on-chain rows plus negatives, not OHLCV proxies.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Accepted scoped slices exist for Mehrnoom/Mirtaheri social/event and Midsummer BSC meme wash-maker rows; spoofing/layering, AIMM-GT, Mendeley anomaly, and all-chain Midsummer scope remain blocked or rejected.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: No subtype/proxy evidence is promoted into parent-root completion.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Board cursor keeps six prior packets as sub_regime_evidence_only; TVRemix, local panel, HMM/GMM/OHLCV, pump/rug OHLCV, and LPI positive-only surfaces remain rejected for completion.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: No threshold relaxation, runtime code change, raw data commit, or trade-usability claim.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: Latest ledgered runs report thresholds_relaxed=false, runtime_code_changed=false, raw_data_committed=false, trade_usable=false.

prompt_to_artifact_checklist.requirement: If the goal is complete, mark the active goal complete.
prompt_to_artifact_checklist.evidence: This audit finds the objective not achieved; update_goal must not be called.

20260511T112622_vantmacro_source_audit.effect_on_completion: macro composite states are provenance only and do not attach exact MainRegimeV2 provider/instrument/timeframe labels

completion_decision.primary_blocker: Full-cycle/full-universe MainRegimeV2 matrix remains incomplete for Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis, and direct Manipulation variety coverage remains partial despite the new BSC meme wash-maker slice.
